mapper.sql: SELECT ai.id, ai.title, ai.cover_path AS coverUrl, u.nickname AS creatorName, ai.play_count AS playCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audio_folder_relation WHERE audio_id = ai.id) AS collectCount FROM audio_info ai INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ai.creator_id = u.id WHERE ai.is_deleted = 0 AND ai.audit_status = 1
